case_title: LEE, J. VS TRUST DEED AGENCY

docket_entries.description: MOTION VACATE & SET ASIDE JUGMENT OF 1/30/95. FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUST DEED AGENCY HEARING SET FOR APR-03-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION VACATE & SET ASIDE JUGMENT OF 1/30/95. OF APR-03-1995, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRUST DEED AGENCY DEFENDANT EXPRESSLY WAIVED IMPROPER SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUST DEED AGENCY $2,051.10 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,071.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
